============================================
SporlyWorks Installer — macOS Instructions
============================================

If macOS blocks the app with a security warning:

OPTION 1 (Recommended):
  Right-click the app → Click "Open" → Click "Open" again.

OPTION 2 (Terminal):
  Open Terminal and run:
  xattr -cr ~/Downloads/SporlyWorks_Installer.app
  Then double-click the app normally.

OPTION 3 (System Settings):
  Go to System Settings → Privacy & Security
  Scroll down and click "Open Anyway" next to the blocked app.

This app is open-source and safe. macOS shows this warning
for any app not distributed through the Mac App Store.
============================================
